title: corema azoricum
intro: Corema azoricum, also known as the Azores rosemary or broom tree, is a shrubby plant native to the Azores Islands. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Corema azoricum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cognitive function, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Corema azoricum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or extract, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
